name: Nested Backtrack and Filler
input: um I think we should scratch that we must ship one logs two bugs
description: Tests combination of filler removal, backtrack (scratch that), and list formatting.

name: False Positive List Marker with Backtrack
input: the budget is five billion dollars and actually no the budget is seven billion dollars
description: Tests false positive marker '5 billion' and '7 billion' handled by ITN + backtrack.

name: Continuous Dictation with Multiple Backtracks
input: send it now no wait actually scratch that delete that send it on Monday morning
description: Tests multiple backtrack cues in sequence.

name: Mixed ITN and Sentence Normalization
input: i have twenty one apples and five hundred oranges period also we need three bananas
expected: I have 21 apples 500 oranges . also we need 3 bananas
description: Tests ITN for numbers and punctuation, plus sentence capitalization.

name: Complex List with Prepositions
input: we have 5 billion users and at 1 we start the server 2 we deploy the code
expected:
we have 5 billion users and at
1. we start the server
2. we deploy the code
description: Tests list markers when prepositions are present before the number.

name: Morphological Suffix Match
input: I have one apple and two Apples and even three apple's
expected: I have 1 apple 2 Apples and even 3 apple's
description: Tests that word rules handle 's and plural suffixes (if configured in dictionary).

name: Mixed Currency and Dates
input: on january fifth the price was fifty dollars and twenty cents
description: Tests ITN normalization of dates and currency.

name: Branded Term Case Preservation
input: i am using my IPAD to write and EBAY to sell
expected: I am using my iPad to write and eBay to sell
description: Tests that branded/mixed-case dictionary terms (iPad, eBay) are preserved even if input is differently cased.

name: Smart Casing - TITLE CASE
input: THE QUICK BROWN FOX JUMPS OVER THE LAZY DOG
expected: THE QUICK BROWN FOX JUMPS OVER THE LAZY DOG
description: Tests that ALL CAPS input is preserved or handled according to configuration.

name: Aggressive Punctuation and Spacing Handling
input: the     quick   brown ,fox ! ! jumped over  ; the lazy dog .
expected: the quick brown, fox! jumped over; the lazy dog.
description: Tests repeated punctuation collapse, leading/trailing space removal, and comma/semicolon spacing corrections.

name: Lengthy Prefix Before List Marker Abort
input: this is an intentionally very long sentence that establishes a lot of context and backstory before deciding to start listing things out like 1 the first item 2 the second item
expected: this is an intentionally very long sentence that establishes a lot of context and backstory before deciding to start listing things out like 1 the 1st item 2 the 2nd item
description: Tests that list formatting correctly aborts if the prefix text leading up to the markers exceeds the maximum character threshold.

name: Out of Sequence List Fallback
input: our requirements are 1 fast rendering 3 low latency 4 offline support
expected: our requirements are 1 fast rendering 3 low latency 4 offline support
description: Tests that list parsing is strictly sequential and abandons formatting if a numbered item (e.g., 2) is entirely missing.

name: Backtrack within a Numbered List
input: plan is one get the logs two check the scratch that two investigate the crash three ship the fix
expected:
plan is:
1. get the logs
2. investigate the crash
3. ship the fix
description: Tests a backtrack cue occurring inside a numbered list sequence.
